continuity_teleportation.note: A discontinuous jump is a brief event, so the peak surprise frame is meaningful.

gravity_support.note: Unsupported floating persists after the support edge; onset is more informative than plateau peak.

momentum_causality.note: The violation is a sudden causal/directional transition in motion.

object_permanence.note: The missing reappearance becomes an ongoing absence, so sustained surprise should localize by onset.

solidity.note: Wall penetration starts at contact and may remain anomalous over subsequent frames.

spontaneous_vanishing.note: The disappearance itself is a sudden event, even if absence persists afterward.
